series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Cooperative Education and Internship Program (OCIP)
series_metadata.series_description: Reports, program proposals, minutes, presentations and related materials generated by the OCIP and advisory council. The program was established to promote experiential education throughout Ohio to help students and businesses match school skills to work skills and enhance the economy.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep in office until scanned. Destroy after 5 years or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: 5 years or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
